diff --git a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Contract Renewal/Codeunits/SubContrRenewalSubcribers.Codeunit.al b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Contract Renewal/Codeunits/SubContrRenewalSubcribers.Codeunit.al
index 561e7d95..78ea7433 100644
--- a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Contract Renewal/Codeunits/SubContrRenewalSubcribers.Codeunit.al	
+++ b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Contract Renewal/Codeunits/SubContrRenewalSubcribers.Codeunit.al	
@@ -101,6 +101,8 @@ codeunit 8001 "Sub. Contr. Renewal Subcribers"
     [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Document Totals", OnCalculateSalesSubPageTotalsOnAfterSetFilters, '', true, true)]
     local procedure ExcludeLinesFromSalesDocumentTotal(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
     begin
+        if SalesHeader."Recurring Billing" then
+            exit;
         SalesLine.SetRange("Exclude from Doc. Total", false);
     end;
 
diff --git a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Sales Service Commitments/Table Extensions/SalesLine.TableExt.al b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Sales Service Commitments/Table Extensions/SalesLine.TableExt.al
index 92df07ef..86919f25 100644
--- a/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Sales Service Commitments/Table Extensions/SalesLine.TableExt.al	
+++ b/App/Apps/W1/SubscriptionBilling/App/Sales Service Commitments/Table Extensions/SalesLine.TableExt.al	
@@ -265,7 +265,7 @@ tableextension 8054 "Sales Line" extends "Sales Line"
             if Rec.IsTypeServiceObject() then
                 Rec.Validate("Exclude from Doc. Total", IsContractRenewalLocal);
         end else
-            if (Rec.Type = Rec.Type::Item) and (Rec."No." <> '') and (not Rec.IsLineAttachedToBillingLine()) then
+            if (Rec.Type = Rec.Type::Item) and (Rec."No." <> '') and (not Rec.IsLineAttachedToBillingLine()) and Rec.IsSalesDocumentTypeWithServiceCommitments() then
                 Rec.Validate("Exclude from Doc. Total", ItemManagement.IsServiceCommitmentItem(Rec."No."));
     end;
